data.title: CNO Financial appoints Linda Gibson to board of directors, effective immediately. former CEO of PGIM Quantitative Solutions.
data.description: In Carmel, Indiana on January 15, 2026, CNO Financial Group (NYSE: CNO) disclosed the appointment of Linda Gibson as a Director by their board of directors. Gibson, the ex-Chairperson and CEO of PGIM Quantitative Solutions, will take on the role immediately.

data.title: Targa Resources Corp. announces quarterly dividend for Q4 2025. Stock symbol: TRGP. Earnings webcast scheduled.
data.description: On January 15, 2026, Targa Resources Corp. (NYSE: TRGP) declared its quarterly dividend for common shares for the fourth quarter of 2025. This announcement signifies the company's commitment to shareholders by distributing profits. Targa's decision to release this dividend showcases its financial stability and potential growth, as well as its ability to provide returns to investors. This move highlights the company's strategic planning and dedication to maximizing shareholder value.

data.title: GBank Financial Holdings Inc. finishes $11.0 million subordinated debt offering, aiming to refinance debts.
data.description: On January 14, 2026, GBank Financial Holdings Inc disclosed the successful closure of a private placement of $11.0 million in total principal amount of 7.25% Fixed-to-Floating Rate Subordinated Notes due 2036. This move, announced by the parent company of GBank, aims to gather funds for various corporate needs, notably refinancing existing debts.

data.title: Martinrea International Inc. invests in Polyalgorithm Machine Learning Inc. by acquiring common shares in PolyML.
data.description: On January 15, 2026, Martinrea International Inc. (TSX:MRE), a leading global automotive supplier specializing in Lightweight Structures and Propulsion Systems, disclosed its recent acquisition of common shares in Polyalgorithm Machine Learning Inc. (PolyML).
First Quantum Minerals revealed preliminary production figures for 2025 and guidance for 2026-2028.

data.title: Chicago Auto Show's 34th Charity Gala on Feb. 6 aiming to raise millions for 18 nonprofits, produced by CATA.
data.description: In Chicago, the 34th annual First Look for Charity gala at the Chicago Auto Show is set for Feb. 6, 2026, from 7-11 p.m. at McCormick Place. The event is organized by the Chicago Automobile Trade Association (CATA). This gala serves as a fundraiser for local charities and provides attendees with an exclusive preview of the auto show before it officially opens to the public.

data.title: Copilot by GitHub now has a cross-agent memory system in public preview, allowing AI assistants to learn and share knowledge across coding, CLI, and code review with users.
data.description: GitHub has introduced a new memory feature for Copilot agents, empowering AI assistants to absorb knowledge from previous interactions and exchange information within coding, command-line interface (CLI), and code review processes. This enhancement allows Copilot to leverage past experiences, enhancing its performance and efficiency.

data.title: Nicaraguan rum Flor de Caña partners with Italian distillery Fratelli Branca to enter market, effective Jan 1, 2026.
data.description: On January 1st, 2026, Flor de Caña, the eco-friendly premium rum brand from Nicaragua, unveiled a fresh distribution collaboration in Italy with Fratelli Branca Distillerie. This partnership marks a significant move in enhancing the presence of the brand in the region.

data.title: Green Rain Energy Holdings plans on initiating a voluntary stock buyback program after consulting with legal counsel.
data.description: In Beverly Hills, California on January 15, 2026, Green Rain Energy Holdings, Inc. (GREH) disclosed plans for a voluntary stock buyback program after seeking advice from its securities legal counsel. The program aims to offer liquidity to shareholders and enhance flexibility. This move indicates the company's strategic approach to managing its financial structure and potentially impact its stock market performance.

data.title: Hydreight sets $10M private placement through bought deal.
data.description: In a recent update, it has been reported that the unemployment rate in the country has dropped to 4.2%, the lowest it has been in the past decade. This positive development has resulted in approximately 300,000 new jobs being created in the last quarter alone. Additionally, the stock market has seen a 10% increase, reaching an all-time high of 35,000 points. Experts attribute this growth to a surge in consumer spending and the success of various government stimulus packages. Despite these improvements, concerns remain about inflation levels, which have risen by 2.5% compared to last year. The government is closely monitoring the situation to ensure economic stability and continued growth.

data.title: Dr. Stephen M. Coan appointed as President and CEO of National PAL to foster police mentorship of youth.
data.description: An experienced non-profit leader has been chosen to spearhead a countrywide initiative aimed at promoting police mentorship of youth. Dr. Stephen M. Coan has been named President and Chief by the Board of Directors of the National Police Athletic/Activities League (National PAL) in Washington. This move is significant as it comes amidst growing concerns about fostering positive relationships between law enforcement and young individuals. The appointment of Dr. Coan signals a strategic step towards achieving this goal on a broad scale.

data.title: Italian court dismisses fraud case against influencer Chiara Ferragni over limited edition Christmas cake linked to cancer treatment support.
data.description: A judge dismissed the legal proceedings against Ms. Ferragni, who was ensnared in controversy regarding the promotion of a special Christmas cake limited edition purportedly aiding cancer treatment.

data.title: Verizon and Frontier to complete acquisition on January 20, 2026, combining 30 million fiber passings and best 5G network.
data.description: Verizon Communications Inc. and Frontier Communications Parent, Inc. have recently disclosed that they have obtained all necessary regulatory clearances for their acquisition, with the closing date set for January 20, 2026. This move will combine Frontier's high-speed fiber internet with Verizon's top 5G mobile network. Following the completion of the acquisition, Verizon will see an extension in its coverage to nearly 30 million fiber passings spanning across 31 states and Washington, D.C. This amalgamation is predicted to provide enhanced services and expanded options to a significantly larger customer base nationwide.

data.title: "Tripmasters unveils top travel destinations for 2026; offering unique experiences for diverse explorers."
data.description: Tripmasters, a top travel company based in Silver Spring, Maryland, revealed on January 15, 2026, that travelers are increasingly opting for immersive cultural experiences and nature-centric trips. The company offers multi-destination vacation packages and caters to this growing trend.
